steps.title: Set up similar triangles
steps.content: Because $LM$ is parallel to $PQ$, triangles $LRM$ and $QRP$ are similar. Corresponding segments are proportional.

steps.title: Add the segment lengths
steps.content:
The full length is $LQ=LR+RQ$.
$$LQ=10+190/9=90/9+190/9=280/9$$
The answer is D.
